title: Night Enforcement Dominant
description: 73.0% of all violations are recorded between 9PM–6AM. Daytime enforcement is virtually absent — consider expanding day patrol coverage.

title: Parking Violations Dominate
description: 113.6% of recorded violations are parking-related. Non-parking violations like signal jumping and helmet violations are much less represented in this dataset.

title: Sunday Has Highest Violations
description: Sunday records 20.9% more violations than Monday. Commercial areas like KR Market and Upparpet see peak weekend enforcement activity.

title: Station Workload Imbalance
description: Top 5 stations handle 41.3% of all citywide violations. The bottom 30 stations collectively handle less than 15%.

title: High Rejection Rate
description: Overall approval rate is only 69.9%. K.G. Halli station has a rejection rate of 41.8% — investigate data quality or review process issues.

title: 2W Vehicles Lead Violations
description: 2W is the most frequent vehicle category at 46.3% of violations. CAR class has the best approval rate at 74.8%.

title: Jan 2024 Enforcement Peak
description: Jan 2024 recorded 64,815 violations — the highest month in the processed range.

title: Junction Concentration
description: BTP051 - Safina Plaza Junction alone accounts for 15,174 violations. Top 5 junctions handle a disproportionate share of all junction-tagged violations.
